text: Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Mist in the morning and at night. Force 2 to 3 south to southeasterly winds.
Fine apart from cloudy periods. Mist in the morning and at night. Light winds, becoming force 2 to 3 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Mist in the morning and at night. Force 2 to 3 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Mist in the morning and at night. Force 2 to 3 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Mist at first. One or two showers later. Light winds, becoming force 3 to 4 southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds, occasionally force 5.
